mapper.sql: id, user_id, currency, trans_type, amount, balance_after, ref_id, remark, create_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO account_transaction_log (user_id, currency, trans_type, amount, balance_after, ref_id, remark, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{currency}, #{transType}, #{amount}, #{balanceAfter}, #{refId}, #{remark}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE account_transaction_log SET user_id = #{userId}, currency = #{currency}, trans_type = #{transType}, amount = #{amount}, balance_after = #{balanceAfter}, ref_id = #{refId}, remark = #{remark}, create_time = #{createTime} WHERE id = #{id}
